name: buidl
description: Full dev lifecycle for OP_NET Bitcoin L1 projects: idea → challenge → spec → build → review → ship. Includes the OP_NET Bible (2000+ lines of rules, patterns, and known mistakes) that prevents AI agents from hallucinating package versions, using forbidden patterns, or shipping exploitable code. Now with mandatory on-chain E2E testing — the agent does ALL testing so the user never has to.
